metadata.title: Banners
metadata.description: Add banner images to your notes!

regex.target: .setName("Banner 高度")
.setName("Banner 风格")
.setName("在预览模式嵌入下展示 Banner")
.setName("预览模式下嵌入 Banner 的高度")
.setName("Frontmatter 字段名称")
.setName("拖动 Banner 时使用的修饰键")
.setName("水平对齐方式")
.setName("垂直对齐方式")

.setName("建议图像数量限制")
.setName("Banner 文件夹")
.setName("允许移动端拖拽")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set how big the banner should be in pixels")
regex.target: .setDesc("设置 Banner 的像素大小")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set a style for all of your banners")
regex.target: .setDesc("为您的所有 Banner 设置统一风格")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set the banner size inside the internal embed")
regex.target: .setDesc("设置内部嵌入中的 Banner 尺寸")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set the banner size inside the page preview embed")
regex.target: .setDesc("设置页面预览嵌入中的 Banner 尺寸")

regex.source: .setPlaceholder("Pick an emoji to use as an icon")
regex.target: .setPlaceholder("选择一个表情符号作为图标")
.setPlaceholder(`${L.height}`)
.setPlaceholder(`${L.internalEmbedHeight}`)
.setPlaceholder(`${L.previewEmbedHeight}`)
.setPlaceholder(`${L.localSuggestionsLimit}`)

regex.source: .appendText("Choose whether to display the banner in the internal embed. This is the embed that appears when you write ")
regex.target: .appendText("选择是否在内部嵌入中显示 Banner。当您在一个文件中输入 ![[file]] 时出现的嵌入就是内部嵌入。")
.appendText(" ")

regex.source: .appendText("Choose whether to display the banner in the page preview embed. This is the embed that appears from the ")
regex.target: .appendText("选择是否在页面预览模式嵌入中显示 Banner。这是核心插件中出现的嵌入。")
.appendText(" ")

regex.source: .appendText("Set a customizable frontmatter field to use for banner data.")
regex.target: .appendText("设置一个可自定义的 Frontmatter 字段，用于 Banner 数据。")
.appendText(" 将会使用字段 ")
.appendText(", ")
.appendText(", 等等……")

regex.source: .appendText("Set a modifier key that must be used to drag a banner.")
regex.target: .appendText("设置一个拖动 Banner 时按下的修饰键")

regex.source: .appendText(" means that you must hold down Shift as you drag the banner to move it. This can help to avoid accidental banner shifts.")
regex.target: .appendText(" 意味着当您拖动 Banner 时必须按下 Shift 键。这可以避免 Banner 意外移动。")
.appendText("水平对齐图标")
.appendText("如果将其设置为 ")

regex.source: .appendText(", you can set an offset, relative to the left side of the note. This can be any valid ")
regex.target: .appendText("，您可以设置一个相对于笔记左侧的偏移量。这可以是任何有效值 ")
.appendText(", 例如 ")

regex.source: .appendText("Align the icon vertically, relative to a banner (if any).")
regex.target: .appendText("垂直对齐图标，相对于 Banner（如果存在的话）.")

regex.source: .appendText(", you can set an offset, relative to the center of a banner's lower edge. This follows the same format as the setting above.")
regex.target: .appendText("，您可以设置一个相对于 Banner 底部边缘中心的偏移量。这个设置遵循上面提到的相同格式。")
.appendText("Twitter的表情符号在这里有更好的支持 ")

regex.source: .appendText("This is only applied in the Icon modal and the banner icon in the preview view")
regex.target: .appendText("这仅在 icon 弹出窗口和预览视图中的 Banner 图标中应用")
.appendText("如果设置较高的数量，当“展示预览图像”( ")

regex.source: .appendText(" to a valid folder in the settings.")
regex.target: .appendText(" 对应一个合法的文件夹")
.createEl("code",{text:""})
.createEl("b",{text:"Custom"})
.createEl("a",{text:"CSS length value",href:"https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Learn/CSS/Building_blocks/Values_and_units#lengths"})
.createEl("code",{text:"10px"})
.createEl("code",{text:"-30%"})
.createEl("code",{text:"calc(1em + 10px)"})
.createEl("b",{text:"注意: "})
.createEl("b",{text:"Banners 文件夹"})
name: "添加/更改本地图片banner"
name: "添加/更改表情符号/图标"
name: "锁定/解锁banner位置"
name: "从剪贴板粘贴banner"
name: "移除banner"
name: "删除图标"

regex.source: "A nice, lil' thing to add some flair to your notes"
regex.target: "一个不错的，小巧的插件，可以为您的笔记增添一些风采。"

regex.source: "Choose whether to display the banner in the internal embed. This is the embed that appears when you write "
regex.target: "选择是否在内部嵌入中显示横幅。这是当你编写时出现的嵌入。"

regex.source: "Choose whether to display the banner in the page preview embed. This is the embed that appears from the "
regex.target: "选择是否在页面预览嵌入中显示横幅。这是从出现的嵌入。"

regex.source: "Set a customizable frontmatter field to use for banner data."
regex.target: "设置一个自定义的元数据字段以用于横幅数据。"

regex.source: "Set a modifier key that must be used to drag a banner."
regex.target: "设置拖动横幅时必须使用的修饰键。"

regex.source: " means that you must hold down Shift as you drag the banner to move it. This can help to avoid accidental banner shifts."
regex.target: "意味着在拖动横幅时必须按住Shift键才能移动它。这有助于避免意外的横幅移动。"

regex.source: "Give people a lil' notion of what your note is about"
regex.target: "让人们对你笔记的内容有一个大致的概念"

regex.source: ", you can set an offset, relative to the left side of the note. This can be any valid "
regex.target: "，您可以设置相对于笔记左侧的偏移量。这可以是任何有效的"

regex.source: "Align the icon vertically, relative to a banner (if any)."
regex.target: "垂直对齐图标，相对于横幅（如果有）。"

regex.source: ", you can set an offset, relative to the center of a banner's lower edge. This follows the same format as the setting above."
regex.target: ", 您可以设置相对于横幅下边缘中心的偏移量。这与上面的设置格式相同。"

regex.source: "This is only applied in the Icon modal and the banner icon in the preview view"
regex.target: "这仅在图标模态和预览视图中的横幅图标中应用。"

regex.source: 'For the modal that shows when you run the "Add/Change banner with local image" command'
regex.target: '在运行“使用本地图像添加/更改横幅”命令时显示的模态对话框。'

regex.source: "Enabling this will display a preview of the images suggested"
regex.target: "启用此功能将显示建议的图像预览"

regex.source: "Show up to this many suggestions when searching through local images."
regex.target: "在搜索本地图片时显示最多这些建议。"

regex.source: "Select a folder to exclusively search for banner files in."
regex.target: "选择一个文件夹，仅在其中搜索横幅文件。"

regex.source: "If empty, it will search the entire vault for image files"
regex.target: "如果为空，将在整个仓库中搜索图像文件。"
"没有经过充分测试，可能会有些挑剔"
